description: 10-problem benchmark for Aletheia OpenCode native skill validation

problems.statement: For any finite set S with n elements, the power set P(S) has cardinality 2^n
problems.lean_statement: theorem powerset_cardinality (S : Finset α) : S.powerset.card = 2 ^ S.card

problems.statement: Every finite group of prime order is cyclic
problems.lean_statement: theorem prime_order_cyclic (G : Type) [Group G] [Fintype G] (hp : Nat.Prime (Fintype.card G)) : IsCyclic G

problems.statement: Every ideal in a principal ideal domain is principal
problems.lean_statement: theorem pid_ideals_principal (R : Type) [CommRing R] [IsPrincipalIdealRing R] (I : Ideal R) : ∃ a, I = Ideal.span {a}

problems.statement: If f is continuous on [a,b], then f is uniformly continuous on [a,b] (Heine-Cantor)
problems.lean_statement: theorem continuous_compact_uniformly_continuous (f : ℝ → ℝ) (a b : ℝ) (hab : a < b) (hf : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc a b)) : UniformContinuousOn f (Set.Icc a b)

problems.statement: The limit of a convergent sequence of real numbers is unique
problems.lean_statement: theorem limit_unique (a : ℕ → ℝ) (x y : ℝ) (hx : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (𝓝 x)) (hy : Filter.Tendsto a Filter.atTop (𝓝 y)) : x = y

problems.statement: A function f is continuous at x₀ if and only if for all ε > 0, there exists δ > 0 such that |x - x₀| < δ implies |f(x) - f(x₀)| < ε
problems.lean_statement: theorem continuous_at_iff (f : ℝ → ℝ) (x₀ : ℝ) : ContinuousAt f x₀ ↔ ∀ ε > 0, ∃ δ > 0, ∀ x, |x - x₀| < δ → |f x - f x₀| < ε

problems.statement: The intermediate value theorem: if f is continuous on [a,b] and f(a) < k < f(b), then there exists c ∈ (a,b) such that f(c) = k
problems.lean_statement: theorem intermediate_value_theorem (f : ℝ → ℝ) (a b k : ℝ) (hab : a < b) (hf : ContinuousOn f (Set.Icc a b)) (hfab : f a < k ∧ k < f b) : ∃ c ∈ Set.Ioo a b, f c = k

problems.statement: The sum of a convergent series plus a convergent series is convergent
problems.lean_statement: theorem tsum_add (a b : ℕ → ℝ) (ha : Summable a) (hb : Summable b) : Summable (a + b) ∧ ∑' n, (a n + b n) = (∑' n, a n) + (∑' n, b n)

problems.statement: Bolzano-Weierstrass: every bounded sequence in ℝ has a convergent subsequence
problems.lean_statement: theorem bolzano_weierstrass (a : ℕ → ℝ) (hbdd : BddAbove {x | ∃ n, a n = x} ∧ BddBelow {x | ∃ n, a n = x}) : ∃ (f : ℕ → ℕ) (x : ℝ), StrictMono f ∧ Filter.Tendsto (a ∘ f) Filter.atTop (𝓝 x)

problems.statement: By the Fundamental Theorem of Arithmetic, every integer n > 1 has a unique prime factorization
problems.lean_statement: theorem unique_prime_factorization (n : ℕ) (hn : n > 1) : ∃! (f : ℕ → ℕ), (∀ p, Nat.Prime p → n = ∏ p in Finset.filter Nat.Prime (Finset.range (n + 1)), p ^ f p) ∧ (∀ p, Nat.Prime p → f p > 0 → p ≤ n)
